calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-27-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Arkady Itkin, Esq. Law Office of A. Itkin 415-640-6765 arkady@arkadylaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff Sharon Wong,
ARAM V. KARAGUEUZIAN, Esq., HIRSCHFELD KRAEMER LLP (310) 255-0705 akaragueuzian@hkemploymentlaw.com, Attorneys for Defendant COMFORT CALIFORNIA, INC.

Defendant's Notice of Contest was received by court late at 4:27 p.m. All parties are present. Court calls the matter. Court indicates to counsel that Judical notice was taken.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHARON WONG'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint

The motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted. There is a liberal policy of allowing amendment so that disputes may be heard on their merits. (Hirsa v. Superior Court (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-489.) Defendants note that Plaintiff Sharon Wong has an ongoing action raising the same issue before the Labor Commissioner. The Labor Commissioner's policy of declining jurisdiction over matters that are proceeding in court cannot abrogate a statutory right to bring wage claims. To the extent defendants contest the sufficiency of the proposed pleading, their arguments can be raised on demurrer. Plaintiff shall file the proposed amended complaint within 10 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
